title: Korevix's Tools
description: Overhauls Minecrafts base tools while still keeping that vanilla flair.
body:
![What all the tools look like (Doesn't include trident or bow)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/865650df3031836782db544978c7d52d1fb89ed3_0.webp)
This Minecraft Texture pack retains the vanilla style while modernizing it. 

It is pretty basic in what it is, but it currently overhauls the base set of tools from Wooden to Netherite.

The texture pack is in 16x detail, so you shouldn't have a change in fps either.

I hope you like the texture pack. Feel free to DM me if you find any bugs or have any suggestions.

If you're a content creator or modpack maker, you are free to use this texture pack. I do not require credit, but it would be nice if you could credit me. If you do on YouTube, you can just put "@KorevixVayleen made the texture pack" or something along those lines. It would be best to @ my channel. For Modpacks, well, you can just put my name somewhere in the description.
